subject: A green-skinned goblin in leather armor leaps mid-air through a collapsing wooden structure, arms and legs splayed wide, teeth bared in a grin
description: A stout green-skinned goblin bursts through the frame in a leaping pose, arms and legs fully extended outward. It wears dark leather armor with a red cloth belt and red scarf, and heavy boots. Its mouth is open wide, baring teeth in an expression somewhere between aggression and delight. Shattered wooden planks and debris fly outward around it against a warm amber-dust background, suggesting a wall or structure has just been broken through. The painting style is painterly and kinetic, the body fully airborne.
background: warm amber dust and shattered wooden structure
